items.description: Navigating to the detail page for a SKU that has stock at multiple locations renders one row per location with the location name and current quantity
The SKU detail route module does not import the DB session; the read path is enforced as boundary -> service -> repository with no ORM access outside the repository (layering contract, NFR-F1-7)

Seeding stock for a SKU at N locations and requesting the detail view returns exactly N rows with matching location, quantity, and tracking code for each seeded record, with no records omitted (read completeness, NFR-F1-7)
Each location row in the SKU detail view displays the inventory tracking code stored on that location's stock record
A location row whose optional fields (e.g., par level) have no stored value displays the literal text 'not tracked' rather than a blank cell or raw null
